rulings.Case Title: LEOPOLDO CAP VS. AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 14,2012 Line 5. DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continue to June 28, 2012, moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C by June 21, 2012 by 4:00pm. Cover letter to reflect new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORA HIDALGO et al VS. AMERICA'S WHOLESALE LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 14,2012 Line 1 - DEFENDANT AMERICA'S WHOLESALE LENDER, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA,N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON AKA, RECONTRUST COMPANY NA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to 2nd , 3rd and 11th causes of action to allege tender. Grant without leave to amend 1st, 4th to 10th causes of action, no opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GUSTAVO RIOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 14,2012 Line 2 - PLAINTIFF EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)
